name: 30-Layer Recursive GPT (10 Physical x 3 Recursive) + VRL + Parallel Muon
blurb: Extreme 30-layer virtual depth via 3x recursion (10 physical layers) + Value Residual Learning (VRL) + Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) + BigramHash(3072) + Trigram + Parallel Muon. Optimized for H100 with Activation Checkpointing. Target Score: 1.10 BPB. Compressed Size: <16MB target.
author: Jtss-ux
